unsupported_snowflake_features: EXTERNAL TABLES with Snowflake-specific file formats
Time Travel (Databricks has time travel via Delta Lake versioning)
Snowflake Materialized Views (Delta Live Tables alternative)
Snowflake SQL UDFs (convert to Databricks SQL UDFs or Python UDFs)
Snowflake Information Schema with Snowflake-specific tables
ACCOUNTADMIN, SYSADMIN roles (use Databricks workspace/admin roles)

delta_lake_features.merge: MERGE INTO target USING source ON condition WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ... WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ...
delta_lake_features.update: UPDATE table SET column = value WHERE condition
delta_lake_features.time_travel: SELECT * FROM table VERSION AS OF version_number
delta_lake_features.change_data_feed: Requires Delta CDF to be enabled on the table

databricks_specific_syntax.create_table: CREATE TABLE [IF NOT EXISTS] table_name (columns) USING DELTA [LOCATION path] [TBLPROPERTIES (props)]
databricks_specific_syntax.create_view: CREATE [OR REPLACE] [TEMPORARY] VIEW [IF NOT EXISTS] view_name AS query
databricks_specific_syntax.create_function: CREATE [OR REPLACE] FUNCTION [IF NOT EXISTS] function_name (params) RETURNS type [LANGUAGE SQL] AS 'body'
databricks_specific_syntax.merge_into: MERGE INTO target t USING source s ON condition WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ... WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ...
databricks_specific_syntax.create_schema: CREATE SCHEMA [IF NOT EXISTS] schema_name [COMMENT 'comment'] [LOCATION path]

sql_conversion_rules.snowflake: QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY {cols} ORDER BY {order}) = 1
sql_conversion_rules.databricks: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY {cols} ORDER BY {order}) AS rn) WHERE rn = 1
